history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, upper-body portrait of a young woman with striking, bright blue eyes and long, flowing lavender-colored hair. She has a fair complexion with rosy cheeks and glossy pink lips. Her makeup is dramatic, with prominent eyeliner and long lashes. She is wearing a white collared shirt with a red bow tie. Delicate white lines, resembling anime-style accents, are drawn around her face and hair, including cat ears and a swirl symbol. There are also small white plus signs and a heart shape scattered in the background, which is a dark, gradient gray. The lighting is soft and dramatic, creating highlights on her hair and face, and casting a shadow to her left. The overall mood is ethereal and playful, with a hint of a cosplayer aesthetic. Text overlays on the left side of the image read "FB : Melmel Cos", "IG : memellow", and "TT : .mel_lalello".
